reasoning: Yuki has demonstrated strengths in basic communication and polite interactions, which will be beneficial in a travel and orientation context. This area will also help address her anxiety about new vocabulary by introducing travel-related terms in a supportive manner, while connecting to her previous experience in ordering and shopping scenarios.
opening_approach: Start with a simple role-play of asking for directions and understanding basic travel information, such as at a train station or airport, to build on her previous success in ordering and shopping.
watch_for: Missing articles and verbs in sentences, limited vocabulary recall, anxiety about new vocabulary
